name: CayleyR: Solving the TopSpin puzzle via cycle intersection

description: arXiv:2607.13219v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: We present cayleyR, an R package for solving permutation puzzles by detecting cycle intersections in Cayley graphs. The core algorithm performs an iterative bidirectional search: from both the initial and target permutation states, random operation sequences generate cycles in the Cayley graph of the symmetric group Sn; their intersection yields a...
author: Yuri Baramykov
